title: selaginella nanophylla
intro: Selaginella nanophylla, also known as 'dwarf spike moss' or 'spike moss', is a species of flowering plant in the family Selaginellaceae. It is a small, evergreen plant with needle-like leaves that grows in tropical and subtropical regions. The medicinal properties of Selaginella nanophylla are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation and improve immune function, with studies suggesting its potential in treating various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Selaginella nanophylla, including teas and infusions, are often used to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms associated with colds, coughs, and sore throats.
